notes: Added the encounters dataset: 1921 Crystal wild encounters across 79 areas (Johto+Kanto), one record per location×species×method×time-of-day. Source: Serebii Pokéarth Gen-II Crystal sections (src-serebii-pokearth, primary); cross-checked against Bulbapedia location articles (src-bulba-locations): 363 corroborated, 1554 Serebii-only, 4 disagreements flagged (confidence:flagged). Methods: grass (time-of-day morn/day/nite), surf, old/good/super-rod, headbutt-special/regular, rock-smash. Gift/static Pokémon (no rate%) and interactables excluded — those belong to a later dataset. Multi-area pages split into sub-locations via Serebii area anchors (e.g. 'Union Cave (B1F)', 'Mt. Mortar (1F #2)').

Added the trainers dataset: 287 Crystal trainers across 75 areas, one record per trainer (party=initial team; phone rematches and starter-dependent variants summarised in notes). Source: Serebii Pokéarth Gen-II Crystal trainer sections (src-serebii-pokearth, primary); cross-checked against Bulbapedia Gen-II trainer tables (src-bulba-locations): 158 corroborated (party+levels), 112 Serebii-only, 17 disagreements flagged. Reward $ pulled from Bulbapedia where matched; gym leaders/Elite Four/Champion/Rival have no reward in source. Fields: location, trainer-class, trainer-name, party, battle-type, reward, notes.
Images (772) and achievements (337) datasets preserved unchanged. Remaining: items, trades (Bulbapedia/Serebii).
